03 How It Works - YouTube.mp4
Now that you know what an operating system is, let's talk about how we're going to build yours. Remember, an operating system is a set of algorithms and a common language that enables the different components to communicate with one another in support of the desired outputs of a machine, which in this case is your business. So these three components, the set of algorithms, common language, and desired outputs, these are the components that form the basis of the Scalable OS Framework. Here's how we're going to leverage this framework and the three components to architect your company's operating system First, we'll document the set of algorithms that make your business run. These include your value engines, business playbooks, and team hierarchy and accountability, or the high-output team canvas, as we like to call it.
Second, we'll define and develop your company's communication architecture. This includes the scorecards that you use to know if you're behind or on track, as well as the meeting rhythm and communication architecture that lays out how information is shared and spread throughout the organization. Finally, in step three, we'll clarify your company's desired outputs using a proprietary tool called a clarity compass so that your people and your systems are all aligned and motivated to achieve one common goal. This framework, plus the six proprietary tools that power the model, will enable you to build a fully customized operating system that will scale as your business scales. In other words, while you will need to make the occasional upgrade, the overall structure will last the life of your business. Think about it like a home.
You know, over time, homes need to be repainted, roofs need to be repaired, and whole rooms will be combined or added on But the blueprint of the home, the original architecture, that remains true and unchanged. The same will be true with your company's operating system. And should you ever decide to sell, the plans can transfer to the new owner, allowing you to achieve the kind of freedom and wealth that few entrepreneurs ever realize. So that's how it works. Now let's talk about what we're gonna be doing to make it happen
